purpose: Archetype library for Customer (personal) + Buyer (purchasing) profiles using the same 8 archetypes (Builder/Architect/etc).

intended_storage: Option A: store as JSONB in a table like archetype_library (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, payload JSONB)
Option B: commit as /public/archetypes/library.json and load server-side into result payloads
Option C: hardcode as a module server/archetypeLibrary.js exporting this object

rendering_hint.customer_personal_profile: Use the 'personal' lens for the customer-facing personality/coaching copy.
rendering_hint.buyer_purchasing_profile: Use the 'buyer' lens for purchase behavior + owner-facing marketing notes.
rendering_hint.balance_logic: Treat 35–55% as 'balanced', >55% as 'dominant/overused risk', <15% as 'underused/growth area' (adjust thresholds as you prefer).

archetypes.subtitle: The System Builder
archetypes.tagline: You see what others can’t. You design reality before it exists.

when_strong: You simplify chaos into a clear plan.
You think in systems: inputs → process → output.
You set priorities that prevent wasted effort.
when_out_of_balance_high: You over-plan and delay action.
You get stuck perfecting frameworks instead of shipping.
You can sound 'too technical' or detached.
when_out_of_balance_low: You feel scattered, reactive, and unclear.
You jump between tasks with no through-line.
You rely on others to set direction.
daily_practices_to_build: 10-minute 'System Scan': write the 3 moving parts of today (Goal, Constraint, Next Step).
Define success before starting: 'Done looks like ____'.
End-of-day 3-line review: What worked / What broke / One fix for tomorrow.
weekly_practices_to_build: Create a 1-page Weekly Blueprint: top 3 outcomes, key metrics, 5 tasks max per outcome.
Remove one recurring bottleneck (automate, template, delegate, or delete).

balance_signals.balanced_look: Clear direction + steady execution without analysis paralysis.
balance_signals.needs_downshift: More planning than progress; low shipping velocity.

buying_motivations: A system that scales and reduces risk
buying_fears: Hidden costs, vague promises, and messy processes
No roadmap, no documentation, no plan
Paying for hype instead of outcomes
buyer.decision_style: Research-first. Wants a clear model, timeline, and success criteria before committing.
best_offers_for_them: Roadmaps, audits, strategy sessions, implementation plans
Dashboards, SOP libraries, templates, and repeatable systems
messaging_that_converts: Show the framework (steps + timeline + what happens next).
Use measurable outcomes and case studies.
Offer a 'pilot' with defined deliverables.
red_flags_in_your_pitch: Too much emotion, not enough proof
Unclear scope or no success metrics

archetypes.subtitle: The Creator of Reality
archetypes.tagline: You forge the world from raw vision to solid form.

when_strong: You turn ideas into tangible results fast.
You learn by doing and improve in motion.
You create visible progress that inspires others.
when_out_of_balance_high: You build without verifying direction (busy, not effective).
You start too many things and finish too few.
You resist documentation and repeat mistakes.
when_out_of_balance_low: You hesitate to start; perfectionism or fear of failure shows up.
You overthink instead of producing.
You rely on motivation instead of process.
daily_practices_to_build: One 'Ship Block' per day: 45–90 minutes producing a deliverable (even small).
Use the 80/20 rule: deliver the simple version first, improve later.
End each work session by setting the next 'first step' for tomorrow.
weekly_practices_to_build: Choose 1 build goal for the week and finish it (no new projects until done).
Create a reusable template from anything you did twice.

balance_signals.balanced_look: Consistent shipping + alignment with a clear goal.
balance_signals.needs_downshift: High output but low impact; scattered builds.
balance_signals.needs_upshift: No tangible progress; too much thinking.

buying_motivations: Clear next steps and immediate wins
buyer.decision_style: Action-first. Wants to start quickly and iterate.
best_offers_for_them: Done-for-you services, quick-start packages, implementation sprints
Bundles with checklists, templates, and a clear execution plan
messaging_that_converts: Show what they get in week 1 and how fast they’ll see progress.
Use 'before/after' examples and simple next-step CTAs.
Offer a fast onboarding and a visible first milestone.
red_flags_in_your_pitch: No clear deliverable or launch point

archetypes.subtitle: The Execution Master
archetypes.tagline: You transform plans into results with relentless speed.

when_strong: You create routines and get things done.
You stabilize chaos and keep progress steady.
You hold yourself and others accountable.
when_out_of_balance_high: You become rigid, controlling, or impatient.
You optimize tasks but ignore people’s experience.
You value completion over learning.
when_out_of_balance_low: You struggle with consistency and follow-through.
You procrastinate or get overwhelmed by logistics.
You avoid structure and drift.
daily_practices_to_build: Start-of-day: pick 3 outcomes, not 20 tasks.
Use time blocks (2–3 blocks/day) and protect them.
End-of-day: close loops (reply, schedule, file, next action).
weekly_practices_to_build: Create one operating rhythm: Mon planning / Wed review / Fri closeout.
Measure 1 metric weekly (leads, sales, workouts, etc.) and improve it.

balance_signals.balanced_look: Steady progress + flexibility when reality changes.
balance_signals.needs_downshift: Rigid, stressed, micromanaging, losing human touch.

buyer.decision_style: Wants a defined process, SLA-like clarity, and clean handoffs.
best_offers_for_them: Onboarding checklists, dashboards, automation, ops support
messaging_that_converts: Show your process, your cadence, and what happens each week.
Use clear deliverables + accountability checkpoints.
Demonstrate reliability with testimonials and timelines.

archetypes.subtitle: The Opportunity Finder
archetypes.tagline: You create options—money, leverage, and momentum.

when_strong: You find creative paths to outcomes.
You attract resources (people, money, tools).
You spot opportunities others miss.
when_out_of_balance_high: You chase shiny objects and overcommit.
You optimize for gain, not meaning.
You can become transactional or scattered.
when_out_of_balance_low: You feel stuck and under-resourced.
You hesitate to ask for support.
You miss opportunities because you don’t look for them.
daily_practices_to_build: Ask 1 leverage question/day: 'Who already solved this?'
Make 1 resource request/day (intro, tool, advice, referral).
Track 3 opportunities you saw today (even if you don’t act yet).
weekly_practices_to_build: Pipeline review: list leads, partnerships, upsells, referrals.
Run one experiment/week (offer test, outreach sprint, new channel).

balance_signals.balanced_look: Opportunities align with a clear strategy and are executed.
balance_signals.needs_upshift: No pipeline; not asking; low leverage.

buying_fears: Being trapped in a non-scalable solution
buyer.decision_style: Value-driven. If the upside is clear, they move fast.
best_offers_for_them: Growth campaigns, referral engines, partnership offers
Packages with clear ROI logic and expansion paths
messaging_that_converts: Show the upside clearly (numbers, scenarios, ranges).
Offer tiered options (good/better/best).
Demonstrate how this unlocks the next level.
red_flags_in_your_pitch: No way to scale after purchase

archetypes.subtitle: The Bridge Between Worlds
archetypes.tagline: You unite people and open doors through trust.

when_strong: You build rapport quickly and keep people engaged.
You create community and shared momentum.
You sense what people need emotionally.
when_out_of_balance_high: You people-please and avoid hard boundaries.
You say yes too often and burn out.
You prioritize harmony over truth.
when_out_of_balance_low: You feel isolated and struggle to ask for help.
You don’t nurture relationships consistently.
You miss opportunities because you don’t network.
daily_practices_to_build: Send 1 genuine message/day (check-in, appreciation, support).
Practice one clear boundary/day (a respectful no).
Create one 'connection moment' (introduce two people).
weekly_practices_to_build: Host or attend 1 community touchpoint/week (call, meetup, group).
Review your top 10 relationships and nurture 3 intentionally.

buying_fears: Buying from someone they can’t trust
buyer.decision_style: Trust-first. They buy from people and stories before features.
best_offers_for_them: Community memberships, coaching groups, high-touch experiences
messaging_that_converts: Use stories, testimonials, and community language.
Show care: what support looks like after purchase.
Make it easy to share and invite others.

archetypes.subtitle: The Keeper of Wisdom
archetypes.tagline: You bring clarity, insight, and growth to others.

when_strong: You learn fast and explain clearly.
You turn confusion into understanding.
You uplift others by sharing knowledge.
when_out_of_balance_high: You over-explain and overwhelm people.
You stay in learning mode and delay action.
You become critical when others don’t ‘get it’ quickly.
when_out_of_balance_low: You don’t reflect or learn intentionally.
You repeat mistakes because you don’t extract lessons.
You feel unclear and unconfident.
daily_practices_to_build: Teach-back: write a 5-sentence summary of what you learned today.
Choose one skill and practice 20 minutes/day.
Convert learning into action: 'One thing I’ll apply today is…'
weekly_practices_to_build: Create one mini-lesson/week (post, video, note) to solidify mastery.
Review and refine your personal playbook (what works for you).

balance_signals.balanced_look: Learning + applying + teaching others in simple ways.
balance_signals.needs_upshift: No learning loop; repeating the same problems.

buying_motivations: Being empowered to do it themselves
buyer.decision_style: Clarity-driven. They want to understand what they’re buying and how it works.
best_offers_for_them: Courses, guides, workshops, coaching with curriculum
Resources that build competence and confidence
messaging_that_converts: Explain the method simply (not hype).
Show the curriculum and what they’ll be able to do afterward.
Provide examples, demos, and clear next steps.

archetypes.subtitle: The Guardian of the Realm
archetypes.tagline: You keep people safe and defend what matters.

when_strong: You establish strong boundaries and standards.
You notice risks early and prevent harm.
You create stability for others.
when_out_of_balance_high: You become defensive, suspicious, or controlling.
You block growth because it feels risky.
You overcorrect and shut people down.
when_out_of_balance_low: You tolerate disrespect or chaos.
You avoid conflict and don’t enforce standards.
You feel unsafe, anxious, or easily overwhelmed.
daily_practices_to_build: Boundary reps: say no once/day where needed.
Risk scan: identify the top 1 risk and the top 1 prevention step.
Body-based regulation: 5 minutes breathing/walk to reduce reactivity.
weekly_practices_to_build: Create/refresh a ‘standards list’ (what you allow vs don’t).
Have one courageous conversation/week (clear, calm, direct).

balance_signals.needs_upshift: No boundaries; chaos and disrespect creep in.

buying_fears: Scams, poor quality, being taken advantage of
buyer.decision_style: Risk-aware. They buy when they feel protected and respected.
best_offers_for_them: Services with clear guarantees, policies, and support
Secure onboarding, clear expectations, strong boundaries
messaging_that_converts: Explain protections: policies, support, outcomes, and boundaries.
Use trust signals: reviews, credentials, clarity.
Show how problems are handled (refunds, fixes, escalation).

archetypes.subtitle: The Protector of Order
archetypes.tagline: You keep the mission clean, stable, and sustainable.

when_strong: You maintain consistency and protect quality.
You create routines that keep life/business stable.
You reduce waste and prevent breakdowns.
when_out_of_balance_high: You resist change and new ideas.
You become overly cautious or rigid.
You prioritize rules over outcomes.
when_out_of_balance_low: You neglect maintenance and things decay.
You don’t follow through on upkeep.
You feel disorganized and drained.
daily_practices_to_build: 10-minute reset: clean, file, organize, close loops.
Protect one non-negotiable routine (sleep, planning, workout, etc.).
Quality check: pick 1 thing and improve it 1%.
weekly_practices_to_build: Weekly maintenance block: admin, cleanup, review, backups.
Document the basics: a simple checklist for recurring work.

buying_fears: Messy processes that create future problems
buyer.decision_style: Quality-first. They prefer proven, consistent solutions over flashy ones.
messaging_that_converts: Highlight quality, stability, and long-term care.
Explain maintenance and support after purchase.
Show consistency (history, retention, repeat customers).
red_flags_in_your_pitch: Too much hype, too little stability

buyer_purchasing_profile.title: Your Buying Archetype Profile
buyer_purchasing_profile.note: This section can be customer-visible or owner-only. If owner-only, render in dashboard/customer details, not customer results page.
